form.formComment: At the latest run led but faded 2nd of 8 at Queanbeyan Cl1-Sw on March 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hard Grunt carrying 59kg at $15. Before that 8th of 11 at Queanbeyan Bm50 on February 17 over 1600m, 7 len behind Incantata carrying 59.5kg at $31. Rates highly and expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping with Edika.
On jumping, shifted out, taking Geostorm out.
Inclined to lay outwards while under pressure in the home straight.
Near the 25m shifted in under pressure and Brushed Harlem Tickle.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up 9th of 12 at Wagga Bm58 on March 12 over 1400m, 6 len behind Spread The Love carrying 56.5kg at $31. Second-up ran last of 8 at Sapphire Coast Cl1-Sw on March 30 over 1600m, slow going 9 len behind Exceed Success with 59kg at $15. Tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded on jumping between Zaxton and Think I Do.
Raced keenly through the middle stages.
Began only fairly.

form.formComment: Last start sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 14 at Albury Cl1-Sw on March 19 over 2000m, slow going 10 len behind Hells Spirit carrying 59kg at $31. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 13 at Wagga Cl1-Sw on February 28 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Bottas with 59kg at $31. This no easier and others rate better.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after nine months ran last of 9 at Kembla Grange Mid Mdn on March 3 over 1500m, on a wet track; 15 len behind Ribble Lace carrying 55kg at $17. Previously second-up second last of 8 at this track Mdn on May 8 over 1600m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Mission Giant carrying 57.5kg at $20. Outclassed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the outside barrier shifted behind runners in the early stages.
Became briefly held up rounding the home turn.
Passing the 200m shifted in.
Passing the 900m, had to be checked.
Began awkwardly and bumped Lucky Bay.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 4th of 8 at Sapphire Coast Cl1-Sw on March 30 over 1600m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Exceed Success with 56kg at $1.80. The race before that favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; scored a big 3 len win at Sapphire Coast Ctry Mdn-Sw March 1 over 1400m in soft going defeating Navajo Code carrying 56.5kg at $1.80. Has ability and is among the winning hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 1300m shifted in when not quite clear of Rawano.
Began awkwardly and soon after, bumped by My Mate Elvis.
Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Having third race start. At big odds at debut, got back early 5th of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on February 27 over 1500m, slow going 2.5 len behind Tartan Tiger carrying 58.5kg at $26. Last start ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1500m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Angel City with 58.5kg at $26. Shows promise and can get off the mark this time.
